message:
refactor(tests): extract schema constants, add session picker resilience tests

Three categories of test infrastructure improvements:

1. Schema constant extraction (tests/common/logging.rs, mod.rs):
   - Promote internal schema strings to pub const: TEST_LOG_SCHEMA_V2,
     TEST_ARTIFACT_SCHEMA_V1, EVIDENCE_CONTRACT_SCHEMA_V1,
     FAILURE_DIGEST_SCHEMA_V1, PARITY_TEST_LOGGING_CONTRACT_SCHEMA_V1
   - Re-export all five constants from tests/common/mod.rs

2. Schema constant usage (tests/validate_e2e_artifact_schema.rs):
   - Replace 25+ hardcoded schema string literals with the new
     constants throughout artifact contract, parity contract overlay,
     and synthetic evidence contract validation tests
   - Improves maintainability: schema version bumps now require a
     single constant change instead of find-and-replace across tests

3. Session picker resilience (tests/session_picker.rs):
   - Add corrupt_session_header() helper that replaces the header line
     with invalid JSON
   - continue_recent_skips_unreadable_newest_indexed_session: verify
     that continue_recent_in_dir() falls back to the next-oldest valid
     session when the newest is corrupted
   - resume_with_picker_selected_unreadable_session_falls_back_to_new:
     verify that selecting a corrupted session in the picker creates a
     fresh session instead of crashing

4. Minor Arc migration fix (tests/agent_loop_reliability.rs):
   - Use .as_ref() when pattern-matching Message::Assistant(a) to
     borrow through the Arc

5. Formatting (tests/model_serialization.rs):
   - Line-wrap long Arc::new() call in ToolCallEnd test

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
